name: Bushra Khan
tagline: Final Year B.E Student | Electrical Engineering | Renewable Energy Enthusiast
focus: Power Systems, Renewable Energy & Electrical Machines
bio: I am a Final Year B.E student in Electrical Engineering at Aligarh Muslim University with a strong interest in Power Systems, Renewable Energy, and Smart Grid Technologies. Through industrial training at Harduaganj Thermal Power Station (UPRVUNL), GreenGenius Enviro Solutions, and a 3 MW Solar Power Plant, I have gained practical exposure to power generation, energy management, and electrical systems. I enjoy applying engineering concepts to real-world challenges, continuously learning new technologies, and contributing to innovative and sustainable energy solutions.
